nasb.text: Then you will be brought low; From the earth you will speak, And from the dust where you are prostrate Your words will come. Your voice will also be like that of a spirit from the ground, And your speech will whisper from the dust.

esv.text: And you will be brought low; from the earth you shall speak, and from the dust your speech will be bowed down; your voice shall come from the ground like the voice of a ghost, and from the dust your speech shall whisper.

cnv.text: 你必降低， 從地中說話； 你說的話必細微， 如同出於塵土； 你的聲音必像交鬼者的聲音，從地裡出來； 你的言語必像耳語般低微，如同出於塵土。

ccb.text: 你必一败涂地， 躺在尘土中说话， 你细微的声音从土中传来， 好像地下幽灵的声音。 你耳语般的低声从土中传来。

csbs.text: 你必被降卑，从地里说话， 你的言语低微，从尘土而出； 你的声音像幽魂的声音，从地里出来； 你的言语低弱，从尘土而出。
